headlines.headline: Urvel Grid Chief Operating Officer addresses investor concerns in open letter

sentiment.reasoning: An open letter from the COO suggests management is attempting to mitigate negative sentiment, but the impact is speculative.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
